features: Masterplast Freeze Spray 150Ml Provides Instant Cooling Relief From All Types Of Muscle Twists Sprains And Bruises.
MASTER PLAST 150ML 8PACK FREEZE SPRAY INSTANT INJURY RELIEF SOOTHES TWIST SPRAINS MUSCLE PAIN
description: Product description Masterplast Freeze Spray 150Ml Provides Instant Cooling Relief From All Types Of Muscle Twists, Sprains And Bruises. Directions Spray the product directly onto the affected area for instant cooling relief. Safety Warning Shake the can well before use. Hold the can 10-12 inches from the affected area and spray lightly. Do not spray directly onto the face or eyes. For external use only. See more
